LanguageData.Ancot.OnlyOneInMap: There is only one building in this type can be built on map.
LanguageData.Ancot.NoWeaponAbilityCharge: Can not use: no enough weapon charge.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_OnlyRace: Can not use: the owner don't know how to use this ability.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_NoMechEnergy: Can not use: no enough mech energy.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_NoSpace: Can not use: no enough space.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_NoEnergyShield: Can not use: shield is not ready.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_NoAvailableShield: Can not use: no ready shield.
LanguageData.Ancot.Ability_ChargeLow: Can not use: no enough charge.
LanguageData.Ancot.VerbSwitchInfoDesc: Another fire mode can be used by this weapon.
LanguageData.Ancot.AutoFightDesc: Set current machine to auto combat mode.
LanguageData.Ancot.MechCarrierRecoverDesc: Recall all {1} that have been released, convert them back to {4} for storage. The amount of {4} recovered is related to the percentage of remaining health of {1}. When the health of the recovered {1} is full, {5} release cost can be recovered.\n\nRecover {1} will put the release capability into a long period of cooling.
LanguageData.Ancot.FloatUnit_FollowDesc: Current mode is follow. The float unit will surround {0} and attempt to attack approaching enemies.
LanguageData.Ancot.FloatUnitSortieDesc: Current mode is sortie. The float unit will actively approach and attack {0}'s enemies.
LanguageData.Ancot.ChargeImmediatelyDesc: Immediately charges the held weapon, restoring energy based on weapon maximum charge multiplied by weapon's correction factor.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretDescI: The weapon installed on this apparel.
LanguageData.Ancot.TurretDescII: The weapon installed on this pawn.
LanguageData.Ancot.ProjectileChargedDesc: the projectile fired by this weapon when energy is not empty.
LanguageData.Ancot.BlocksRangedWeaponsDesc: Whether ranged weapons can be used while defending with this shield.
LanguageData.Ancot.CaravanMoveSpeedFactor: move speed factor provided by member
LanguageData.Ancot.SwitchWeaponDesc: Switch to the backup weapon. If the backup weapon slot is empty, the currently equipped weapon will be placed into the backup slot.
LanguageData.Ancot.ApparelReloadableDesc: Select the amount of resources to load. The next loading will not exceed the specified maximum load value.
LanguageData.Ancot.LowVersionWarning: Ancot Library version is too low
LanguageData.Ancot.LowVersionWarningDesc: The mod: {0} requires Ancot Library version {1}, which is higher than the currently loaded Ancot Library version {2}, this may be caused by Steam Workshop failing to update Ancot Library properly after updating {0}.\n\nUsing Ancot Library version lower than required will cause some features in mod: {0} to malfunction. Please ensure that Ancot Library is properly updated.
LanguageData.Ancot.AddToFavorites_Desc: click to add this to favorites
LanguageData.Ancot.RemoveFromFavorites_Desc: click to remove this from favorites
